title: Spawn Entity
description: Adds a timer after which this entity will spawn another entity or item (similar to vanilla's chicken's egg-laying behavior).

filters.title: Filters
filters.description:
If present, the specified entity will only spawn if the filter evaluates to true.

Sample values:
• chicken: [{"test":"rider_count","subject":"self","operat...

entities.title: Entities
entities.description:
List of entity spawn definitions. Can be a single object or an array of objects.

Sample values:
• chicken: [{"min_wait_time":300,"max_wait_time":600,"spaw...
• sniffer: {"min_wait_time":0,"max_wait_time":0,"spawn_sou...

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: If present, the specified entity will only spawn if the filter evaluates to true.

max_wait_time.title: Max Wait Time
max_wait_time.description: Maximum amount of time to randomly wait in seconds before another entity is spawned.

min_wait_time.title: Min Wait Time
min_wait_time.description: Minimum amount of time to randomly wait in seconds before another entity is spawned.

num_to_spawn.title: Num To Spawn
num_to_spawn.description: The number of entities of this type to spawn each time that this triggers.

should_leash.title: Should Leash
should_leash.description: If true, this the spawned entity will be leashed to the parent.

single_use.title: Single Use
single_use.description: If true, this component will only ever spawn the specified entity once.

spawn_entity.title: Spawn Entity
spawn_entity.description: Identifier of the entity to spawn, leave empty to spawn the item defined by "spawn_item" instead.

spawn_event.title: Spawn Event
spawn_event.description: Event to call on the spawned entity when it spawns.

spawn_item.title: Spawn Item
spawn_item.description: Item identifier of the item to spawn.

spawn_item_event.title: Spawn Item Event
spawn_item_event.description: Event to call on this entity when the item is spawned.

spawn_method.title: Spawn Method
spawn_method.description: Method to use to spawn the entity.

spawn_sound.title: Spawn Sound
spawn_sound.description: Identifier of the sound effect to play when the entity is spawned.
